task_completion.description: Verify that a ground station in Austin, TX is configured with the correct coordinates and set as default.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station configuration window or main UI indicator showing 'Austin' with Latitude 30.2672 (or 30.2672 N), Longitude -97.7431 (or 97.7431 W), and Altitude 149m. It should be indicated as the default station (e.g., checked box or default list).

task_completion.description: Verify that a tracking module named 'Deployment_Sim' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a window, tab, or panel in the application explicitly titled 'Deployment_Sim'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the ISS and CSS are included in the 'Deployment_Sim' tracking module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'ISS (ZARYA)' (NORAD 25544) and 'CSS (TIANHE)' (NORAD 48274) listed in the satellite tracking list or radar view within the 'Deployment_Sim' module.

task_completion.description: Verify that the application is configured to display UTC time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'UTC' displayed next to the main clock, in the Time Controller, or in the application's time settings.

task_completion.description: Verify that the simulated time is set to April 15, 2026, at 14:30:00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the date '2026-04-15' (or 'April 15, 2026') and the time '14:30:00' displayed in the application's clock or Time Controller interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Time Controller interface is open, visible, and the clock is paused.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a separate 'Time Controller' window or panel open on the screen. The pause button should appear active/depressed, or the play button should be visible indicating the time is not currently running.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the application's graphical user interface to complete the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual satellite tracking application (e.g., Gpredict) with its menus, dialog boxes, and windows, rather than a terminal window editing configuration files.

integrity.description: Verify that the inputs were entered into the actual application dialogs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard OS/application window borders and UI elements for the Ground Station configuration and Time Controller, ensuring the agent didn't just type the target state into a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the Time Controller is genuinely open in the UI as requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Time Controller must be a visibly rendered UI component on the screen, not just a background setting change.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ground Station: Austin, TX (Lat: 30.2672 N, Lon: 97.7431 W or -97.7431, Alt: 149m). Module Name: 'Deployment_Sim'. Required Satellites: ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544) and CSS (TIANHE) (NORAD 48274). Target Date: 2026-04-15. Target Time: 14:30:00 UTC.
